message:
Command `# Some .vvp files exist. Let me trace what happens step by step
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

# Run runner with verbose and redirect stderr to stdout
python3 -u mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/nc_verify_runner.py \
  --design-root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu \
  --all --coverage \
  --nc-lib-root /nc/apps \
  --verbose \
  2>&1 | head -50 &
BGPID=$!
sleep 45
echo "---AFTER 45s---"
kill $BGPID 2>/dev/null
wait $BGPID 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code -1.
